meaning: National Football Conference,国家足球联盟
examples: Instead, NFC is more likely to take off in emerging markets.
In the Asian countries, the use of NFC phones has made mobile ticketing much easier to implement.
Other airports testing NFC technology include France's Toulouse-Blagnac airport and several Australian airport gates run by Qantas.
The iPhone does not yet have an NFC-enabled chip, though the next edition, being unveiled this autumn, might.
